TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Mizuhu ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 99 buwan, 286 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 271 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 90%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, Hla'aluwa 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mizuhu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mizuhu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mizuhu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mizuhu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mizuhu hya' ga Ua-asik. tay mkyahu' na Mizuhu hya' ga Tanguhla. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mizuħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa ua-as~ɕik. taj mkjaħuʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa taŋuħla. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Mizuhu ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 99 buwan, 286 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 271 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 90%, Tayan 1%, Amis 1%, Hla'aluwa 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mizuhu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mizuhu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Mizuhu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mizuhu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mizuhu hya' ga Ua-asik. tay mkyahu' na Mizuhu hya' ga Tanguhla. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mizuħu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa ua-as~ɕik. taj mkjaħuʔ na mizuħu ħjaʔ ɣa taŋuħla. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
